SEO.title: Partners · Zomaar Zomert
SEO.description: Zomaar Zomert stays free thanks to our partners. Meet the local businesses, sponsors and supporters who make the festival possible year after year.

openGraph.title: Partners · Zomaar Zomert
openGraph.description: Made possible by a whole crew of local businesses, sponsors and supporters.

hero.title: Partners.
hero.intro: Zomaar Zomert is free for everyone, and it stays that way thanks to the companies, local businesses and supporters who put their shoulders to the wheel year after year.

become.title: Become a partner.
become.body: Reach a whole crew of festival-goers, back a free village festival and land in great company.

terrain.label: On the field
items: Your logo on the big LED screen, all weekend long
Banners at the entrances and across the field
Posters in cafés, youth hubs and shops across the region

online.label: Online
items: A fixed spot on the site and the partners page
A dedicated Facebook and Instagram post, tuned to our crowd

extras.label: Between us
items: Sponsor get-together with drinks and small bites during the weekend
Two weeks of pre-festival airtime on the LED screen along the Ninoofsesteenweg

become.closing: Something else in mind? No worries. Give us a ring and we'll find a setup that fits.
